summary: Screen correctly implements filter-empty state with proper messaging and mobile layout. Visual presentation uses dark admin palette which deviates from the diner brand palette specified in the manifesto, but the core state contract and functionality are satisfied.

violations.description: Admin interface uses dark gray/navy palette instead of diner palette surfaces (teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea). Background appears to be dark navy rather than the required diner palette colors.
Logged-in admin surface uses a distinct dark visual system that creates brand discontinuity from the public diner palette, reducing coherent brand experience.

actions: Filter-empty state correctly shows 'No customers match the current filters' message as specified
Mobile narrow layout at 390px keeps heading, search input, and status filter controls visible and usable
Search input shows 'atch-zzX' filter value indicating active search filtering
Status filter shows 'All status' dropdown indicating filtering controls are present
Admin panel navigation and customer management heading are properly displayed
Responsive layout maintains usability without breaking at narrow mobile viewport
